title: Aliya Hemani
content:
People.ContactEmail ahemani@mccarthy.ca
- University of Toronto
Aliya is an associate in our Labour & Employment group in Toronto. She maintains a general practice focused on providing advice to employers in all areas of workplace law.
Aliya received her J.D. from the University of Toronto Faculty of Law. While in law school, she was actively involved in the housing division of Downtown Legal Services, providing legal services to marginalized clients.
Aliya obtained her Honours Bachelor of Arts from Trinity College at the University of Toronto. She was called to the Ontario bar in 2025 and is a member of the Law Society of Ontario.
